titles.title: Jesus Got a Hold of My Life

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus got a hold of my life and he won′t let me go Jesus got into my heart, He got into my soul Well, I used to be, oh, so sad But now I'm free and glad ′Cause Jesus got a hold of my life and He won't let me go

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Sometimes I remember how I used to be livin′ in sin I tried to act happy and free but I wasn't within Well, I fooled a lot of friends of mine They thought I had some peace of mind But I never had a thing until I opened up and let Jesus in
